no: Deep overhaul of priest classes via sphere system. Too much complexity if mixed with ToF — avoid combining them. Sphere systems 1-2 are more restrictive, 3-4 are closer to vanilla.
ic: Deities of Faerun, Divine Remix Sphere system,

conflicts.reason: Both implement divine sphere systems. Mutually exclusive — use one or the other.
conflicts.myComps: #80 Sphere System #31 Cleric Kits #33 Druid Kits

conflicts.reason: FnP Multiclass Druids conflicts with IR's weapon restriction removal for clerics

Both revise Beastmaster kit. F&P #33 (Install Druid kits) includes beast_lord as one of many druid kits — fits sphere system. M&G #235 (Revised Beastmaster) is a standalone ranger revision. M&G tp2 auto-skips #235 if F&P's beast_lord marker file exists. All other components of both mods are compatible.
conflicts.source: M&G tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE !(FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME d5__beastmaster.d5) on #235. Both mods by subtledoctor — mutual exclusion is intentional. Use F&P beast_lord if using sphere system, M&G #235 otherwise, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Deep architectural overlap on divine class systems. FnP cn:80 (Sphere System) reassigns ALL priest spells by deity spheres via lub_*.2da and class ability tables. ToF cn:40650 (Speciality Priests) and cn:50400 (New priest gods) create their own priest systems. FnP cn:31/33 (Cleric/Druid Kits) and ToF cn:40600/40610 (Druid shapeshift/tables) both rewrite druid class architecture. Neither detects the other. FnP documentation warns against mixing with ToF divine components. Install FnP before ToF to minimize conflicts.
conflicts.myComps: #80 Sphere Systems #31 Cleric Kits #33 Druid Kits #35 #36 Paladin Kits #75 Weapon/Armor Usability
conflicts.theirComps: #1500 #1510 IWD spells #2040 Shapeshift spells #40100 Alignment rules #40600 Druid shapeshift #40610 Druid cleric tables #40650 Speciality priests #50400 New priest gods
conflicts.source: FnP uses lub_*.2da/clabpr*.2da for sphere access; ToF uses kit.edit for speciality priests; both rewrite druid CLAB/spell tables; no cross-detection, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: FnP's Alter Priests' Weapon/Armor Usability overlaps with IWDification's priest spell additions, but can be installed on top

Complementary, not conflicting. cdtweaks modifies HOW MANY spell slots (mxsplprs/mxspldru/mxsplwis.2da). FnP modifies WHICH SPELLS are available (sphere-based restriction via lub_*.2da and class ability tables). FnP does NOT modify spell progression 2DAs. FnP cn:30 (spontaneous casting) works on whatever progression tables exist. WIS bonus spells still function under sphere system. Install cdtweaks before FnP.
conflicts.myComps: #30 Cast Like Sorcerers #80 Apply Sphere System
conflicts.theirComps: #2281 Cleric Spell Prog #2290 #2291 Druid Spell Prog #2580 #2581 WIS bonus spells
conflicts.source: FnP uses lub_*.2da for sphere access; cdtweaks COPY mxsplprs/mxspldru; different 2DA files, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Both mods modify divine spell lists. FnP sphere system reassigns spells by deity; SR revises spell effects. FnP should be installed after SR.
conflicts.myComps: #80 Sphere Systems #31 Cleric Kits #33 Druid Kits

conflicts.reason: Both modify cleric and druid spell tables
Both implement sphere systems for divine casters. Mutually exclusive sphere assignments.
Both provide multiclass kit options for divine casters. Install A7 after FnP so it can generate combinations from FnP kits.
conflicts.myComps: #91 Multiclass Druids #92 Multiclass Shamans #31 Multiclass Cleric Kits

conflicts.reason: FORBID_COMPONENT in tp2: Will to Power cn:950 cannot install if F&P #75 is present
conflicts.theirComps: #950 Allow Multiclass Clerics to Use More Weapons

new: Priest of the Morninglord, god of renewal. Dawn-themed healing and anti-undead powers.
Priest of the True God, patron of paladins. Martial divine caster with honor-bound powers.
Priest of Lady Luck. Fortune-based divine magic and luck manipulation.
Priest of the Vigilant One. Protection and warding divine abilities.
Priest of the Lord of the Dead. Anti-undead powers and death domain magic.
Priest of the Lord of Battles. War domain with combat divine magic.
Priest of the goddess of illusion. Deception and illusion divine magic.
Priest of the Maiden of Pain. Pain-inflicting divine magic.
Priest of the Destroyer. Storm and lightning divine magic.
Priest of the Prince of Lies. Deception and strife divine magic.
Priest of the Bitch Queen. Water and storm divine magic.
Priest of the Binder of Knowledge. Lore and divination divine magic.
Priest of the Crying God. Healing and endurance divine magic.
Priest of the Scribe of Oghma. Knowledge and glyph divine magic.
Priest of Firehair. Beauty and charm divine magic.
Elite warrior-priest of the war god. Enhanced combat and war domain magic.
Priest of the High One. Magic domain combining arcane and divine.
Priest of the Mistress of the Night. Darkness and loss divine magic.
Priest of the Darkbringer. Corruption and decay divine magic.
Priest of the Maid of Misfortune. Bad luck and misfortune divine magic.
Elven priest of the Creator of the Elves. Swordplay and arcane-divine magic.
Elven priest of the moon goddess. Dreams, death, and moonlight divine magic.
Elven priest of the Trickster. Mischief, illusion, and change divine magic.
Elven priest of love and beauty. Charm and enchantment divine magic.
Dwarven priest of the Soul Forger. Forge-blessed weapons and protective divine magic.
Dwarven priest of the Father of Battle. War domain with dwarven martial prowess.
Dwarven priest of the Watcher over Wanderers. Travel and protection divine magic.
Gnome priest of the Watchful Protector. Trickery and protection divine magic.
Gnome priest of the forest gnome god. Nature magic combined with gnome trickery.
Gnome priest of illusion and deception. Stealth and illusion divine magic.
Gnome priest of vigilance and combat. Martial divine caster defending gnome communities.
Gnome priest of the Crawler Below. Dark earth magic and destruction.
Heretical priest who steals divine power. No deity allegiance, raw divine energy.
Druid attuned to temperate woodlands. Enhanced plant and animal magic in forests.
Druid of highland realms. Stone and storm nature magic, cold resistance.
Druid of tropical wilds. Poison resistance, insect and plant magic.
Druid of arid wastes. Heat resistance, sand and sun nature magic.
Druid of frozen tundra. Cold resistance, ice and snow nature magic.
Druid of the Underdark. Darkvision, stone and fungal nature magic.
Druid focused on animal companionship. Enhanced summoning and animal empathy.
Druid channeling elemental forces. Access to elemental spells across domains.
Druid who tends insect colonies. Insect summoning and swarm abilities.
Militant druid extremist. Aggressive nature magic, hostility to civilization.
Druid displaced from their grove. Wandering nature magic, adaptable abilities.
Druid attuned to animal totems. Enhanced animal summoning replacing shapeshifting.
Chaotic divine caster. Unpredictable wild magic effects on spells.
Holy champion of the god of justice. Smite evil, detect injustice.
Holy champion of the Lord of the Dead. Anti-undead crusader.
Holy champion of the war god. Battle prowess and war domain abilities.
Dark champion of the god of tyranny. Fear aura and domination powers.
Holy champion of the Watcher. Protection aura and vigilant defense.
Dark champion of the storm god. Lightning and destructive storm powers.
Dwarven holy champion of the Soul Forger. Forge-blessed weapons and armor.
Holy champion of the High One. Spell resistance and anti-magic crusader.
Holy champion of the goddess of strategy. Tactical combat bonuses.
Orcish champion of the One-Eyed God. Berserker rage with dark divine power.
Holy champion of the Firelord. Fire abilities and elemental divine power.
Holy champion of the Crying God. Damage absorption and healing powers.
Dark champion of the god of war and destruction. Berserker fury.
Elven holy champion of the Creator. Elven grace with divine power.
Holy champion of the True God. Honor-bound divine combat.
Holy champion of the Morninglord. Radiant divine combat.
Gnome holy champion of the Watchful Protector.
Dwarven holy champion of the Father of Battle.
Elven holy champion of love and beauty.
Elven holy champion of the moon goddess.
Holy champion of Firehair. Beauty and charm divine combat.
Holy champion of the goddess of magic. Arcane-divine warrior.
Holy champion of the drow goddess of dance. Sword-dancing warrior.
Elven holy champion serving the Seldarine pantheon.
Dwarven holy champion defending clan and forge.
Dark champion of the Prince of Lies. Deception and strife.

sum: Deep overhaul of priest and paladin classes with 17 components. Assigns spells by deity sphere, adds new kits, and makes divine casting more strategic.

co.n: Cleric Spell Table: Revised
co.tp2n: Faiths & Powers Table

co.n: Cleric Spell Table: Un-nerfed
co.tp2n: 'Un-nerfed' Table

co.n: Druids Use Cleric Spell Table and XP Table
co.tp2n: Druids Use Cleric Spell Table and XP Table

co.n: Sphere System: oFnP (original Faiths & Powers)
co.no: HARD FAIL: 'Invalid spell number: -1' — CLERIC spell slots exhausted. Too many divine spells from SR, IWDification, MiH SP consumed all SPPR slots. CLERIC_GREATER_SHIELD_OF_LATHANDER cannot be added. Cascades to cn:31 (Cleric kits warning). WORKAROUND: (1) Try cn:22 (AD&D/DR sphere system) which may use fewer new spells. (2) Remove IWDification divine spells if also using MiH SP divine (redundant coverage). (3) If ToF is fixed and installed, ToF's own spell system may consume slots that FnP needs — test with and without ToF IWD spells. WARNING: Adds 3 L7 priest spells (GREATER_SHIELD_OF_LATHANDER, WITHER, IMPERVIOUS_SANCTITY_OF_MIND). Vanilla EET uses 33/50 L7 priest slots. Fails if other mods consume 15+ L7 slots before FnP. Known contributors: ToF IWD divine (+8), SR (+4), TotLM (+3), SoD2BG2 (+3). Remove DSotSC Priest Spells and check SCS auto-skip components.
co.tp2n: oFnP: the original Faiths & Powers sphere system

co.n: Sphere System: AD&D/DR (inspired by PnP and Divine Remix)
co.no: WARNING: Adds 3 L7 priest spells (GREATER_SHIELD_OF_LATHANDER, WITHER, IMPERVIOUS_SANCTITY_OF_MIND). Vanilla EET uses 33/50 L7 priest slots. Fails if other mods consume 15+ L7 slots before FnP. Known contributors: ToF IWD divine (+8), SR (+4), TotLM (+3), SoD2BG2 (+3). Remove DSotSC Priest Spells and check SCS auto-skip components.
co.tp2n: AD&D/DR: inspired by PnP and Divine Remix

co.n: Sphere System: Vanilla (traditional lists, kits cross cleric/druid divide)
co.no: WARNING: Adds 3 L7 priest spells (GREATER_SHIELD_OF_LATHANDER, WITHER, IMPERVIOUS_SANCTITY_OF_MIND). Vanilla EET uses 33/50 L7 priest slots. Fails if other mods consume 15+ L7 slots before FnP. Known contributors: ToF IWD divine (+8), SR (+4), TotLM (+3), SoD2BG2 (+3). Remove DSotSC Priest Spells and check SCS auto-skip components.
co.tp2n: Vanilla: traditional spell lists, kits can cross the cleric/druid divide

co.n: Sphere System: VPlus (traditional lists, kits get focus on two FnP spheres)
co.no: WARNING: Adds 3 L7 priest spells (GREATER_SHIELD_OF_LATHANDER, WITHER, IMPERVIOUS_SANCTITY_OF_MIND). Vanilla EET uses 33/50 L7 priest slots. Fails if other mods consume 15+ L7 slots before FnP. Known contributors: ToF IWD divine (+8), SR (+4), TotLM (+3), SoD2BG2 (+3). Remove DSotSC Priest Spells and check SCS auto-skip components.
co.tp2n: VPlus: traditional spell lists, kits get focus access to two FnP spheres

co.n: Sphere System: nuFnP (fewer spheres, more balanced, closer to PnP)
co.no: ALSO FAILS with spell slot exhaustion — same CLERIC_GREATER_SHIELD_OF_LATHANDER issue as cn:21 (oFnP). All sphere systems need this L7 spell. FIX: remove MiH SP cn:2 (Divine Spellpack) . WARNING: Adds 3 L7 priest spells (GREATER_SHIELD_OF_LATHANDER, WITHER, IMPERVIOUS_SANCTITY_OF_MIND). Vanilla EET uses 33/50 L7 priest slots. Fails if other mods consume 15+ L7 slots before FnP. Known contributors: ToF IWD divine (+8), SR (+4), TotLM (+3), SoD2BG2 (+3). Remove DSotSC Priest Spells and check SCS auto-skip components.
co.tp2n: nuFnP: a new sphere system (fewer spheres, more balanced, closer to PnP)

co.n: Give Option to Cast Like Sorcerers
co.no: Do not install if planning to use 5E casting
co.tp2n: Give Option to Cast Like Sorcerers (do not install if planning to use 5E casting)

co.n: Install Cleric kits
co.no: 33 deity-specific cleric kits (Ur-Priest, Azuth, Beshaba, Cyric, Deneir, Helm, Ilmater, Kelemvor, Lathander, Leira, Loviatar, Malar, Moander, Mystra, Oghma, Shar, Sune, Talos, Tempus, Torm, Tymora, Umberlee, Moradin, Clangeddin, Marthammor, Haela, Baravar, Baervan, Urdlen, Yondalla, Arvoreen). 16 deities overlap with ToF cn:50400 (22 kits). 15 deities unique to FnP (Beshaba, Deneir, Kelemvor, Leira, Loviatar, Moander, Torm, Marthammor, Haela, Baravar, Urdlen, Yondalla, Arvoreen, Ur-Priest). Avoid if using TA's Spontaneous Casting for Clerics. INSTALLS WITH WARNINGS: No visible warning text in debug log — may inherit warning state from preceding sphere system component. Cosmetic.
co.tp2n: Install Cleric kits

co.n: Install Druid kits
co.no: REMOVED . boring_beetle_animation variable undefined — FnP's kits_new_druids.tpa (lines 1510-1515) looks for BEETLE_BLACK or BEETLE_BORING in ANIMATE.IDS via ACTION_IF FILE_CONTAINS_EVALUATED. Neither entry exists in vanilla BG2EE. They come from Infinity Animations (component #500) which is not installed. FnP has no fallback — variable stays unset and the install aborts. TO FIX: Either (a) install Infinity Animations component #500 before FnP, or (b) append '0xE220 BEETLE_BLACK' to ANIMATE.IDS before FnP druid kits install (the SOS mod provides IC_BEETLE_BLACK at 0xE220 but under a different name FnP doesn't recognize). A one-line APPEND to ANIMATE.IDS in the game directory would resolve this.
co.tp2n: Install Druid kits

co.n: Paladin Kits: Tyr, Torm, Helm, Ilmater, Kelemvor, Sune
co.no: d5_fnp_settings.ini can limit to one NPC-relevant kit (e.g. Arvoreen's pally for Mazzy)
co.tp2n: ...for Tyr, Torm, Helm, Ilmater, Kelemvor, Sune

co.n: Paladin Kits: All above PLUS Neutral/Evil/demihuman deities
co.tp2n: ...for all those, PLUS Neutral/Evil/demihuman deities

co.n: Revised Paladin Spell Table
co.tp2n: Revised Paladin Spell Table

co.n: Alter Priests' Weapon/Armor Usability
co.no: Overlaps with similar components from IWDification, TA, ToF, AK, and MiH, but can be installed on top
co.tp2n: Alter Priests' Weapon/Armor Usability

co.n: Apply Sphere System (REQUIRED for the sphere system to work)
co.no: REQUIRED for sphere system. Adds 3 L7 priest spells (GREATER_SHIELD_OF_LATHANDER, WITHER, IMPERVIOUS_SANCTITY_OF_MIND). Vanilla EET uses 33/50 L7 priest slots. Fails if other mods consume 15+ L7 slots before FnP. Known L7 contributors: ToF IWD divine (+8), SR (+4), TotLM (+3), SoD2BG2 (+3). Remove DSotSC Priest Spells and Hephernaan NPC to free slots.
co.tp2n: Apply Sphere System (REQUIRED for the sphere system to work)

co.n: Multiclass Druids
co.no: Adds 5 multiclass druid kits: Fighter/Druid, Mage/Druid, Ranger/Druid, Thief/Druid, Druid/Monk. Also adds Druid/Sorcerer and Forest Druid variant. Uses F&P sphere system for spell access. Adds 5 kit slots. Install after all druid kit mods.
co.tp2n: Multiclass Druids

co.n: Multiclass Shamans
co.no: Adds 4 multiclass shaman kits: Shaman/Mage, Shaman/Monk, Shaman/Ranger, Shaman/Thief. Also adds Barbarian Shaman variant. Uses F&P sphere system. Adds 4 kit slots. Install after all shaman kit mods (Will of the Wisp, Improved Shamanic Dance).
co.tp2n: Multiclass Shamans

co.n: Multiclass Cleric Kits (install AFTER all other kit mods)
co.no: 6 bespoke multiclass kits (2 C/M: Mystra, Azuth; 2 C/R: Mielikki, Shaundakul; 2 C/T: Mask, Brandobaris) PLUS auto-clone system that creates multiclass variants of all single-class FnP cleric kits via 2da table manipulation (no extra kit slots!). Auto-clones ~17 C/M, ~17 F/C, ~8 C/T kits at 0 extra kit cost. Overlaps with ToF cn:55100 (F/C) and cn:55500 (C/M) which are richer per-kit but cost 14+25 kit slots. INSTALLS WITH WARNINGS (cosmetic): 'Internal ability name too long [CDHLYSYM]' (25x) — WeiDU auto-remaps Holy Symbol ability to SGAB0001. Functional.
co.tp2n: Multiclass Cleric kits (install AFTER all other kit mods!!)

co.n: Apply FnP Multiclass Kits to NPCs
co.no: Assigns F&P multiclass kits to NPCs. Scans installed NPC mods and applies appropriate deity/multiclass kits. Requires F&P multiclass components installed. No kit slots added.
co.tp2n: Apply FnP Multiclass Kits to NPCs
